title: Only 1 more day to enter yearly dog show
bodyText:
OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Oudtshoorn Diereberg's yearly Dog Show is on Saturday 27 July during the @Emporium Winter Market.


> Entries are R50 per dog, as well as a bag of dog food. All dogs must be on a leash at all times and no dogs on heat will be allowed to enter. Entries can be submitted till 24 July.


Categories:

- 1. Dog with waggiest tail
- 2. Dog judge wants to take home
- 3. Dog most like owner
- 4. Most appealing eyes
- 5. Best special needs dog
- 6. Best trick
- 7. Biggest dog (must be at least 12 months)
- 8. Smallest dog (must be at least 12 months)
- 9. Best-kept coat
- 10. Prettiest bitch
- 11. Best puppy
- 12. Best young handler
- 13. Costume
- 14. Golden oldies
- 15. Most handsome boy
- 16. Prettiest smile
- 17. Best interaction between dog and owner
- 18. Most noticeable ears
- 19. Most talkative
- 20. Most obedient
- 21. Best rescue story
- 22. Fattest dog
- 23. Most unique look
- 24. Most adorable

For more information contact Ansa on 072 070 5977.

Photo: Unsplash

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
